description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 49 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His coding was mostly in Java, with some Markdown and other languages. The activity data does not list any public GitHub repositories, commits, or pull requests this week.
